backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a school management system with student, teacher, fee, attendance, and report card management, plus role-based access control and activity audit logging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two font-related changes: replacing Pacifico cursive font with modern fonts (Inter/Poppins/Montserrat) in Footer component and removing/updating the Pacifico font import from index.html.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, pages, and configuration, describing authentication flows, UI components, styling, and PWA features.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes, including variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest link, favicon references, and viewport configuration for School Mitra application.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining School Mitra app metadata, icons, display mode (standalone), theme colors, and screenshots for installation.
frontend/public/offline.html: Offline fallback page with styled UI showing connectivity status and retry button, supporting both light and dark color schemes.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets, network-first with cache fallback for API calls, and offline page fallback while excluding Internet Identity URLs from caching.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component that handles authentication flow, actor initialization, and profile setup, rendering LoginScreen, ProfileSetupModal, or Dashboard based on user state with comprehensive loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogSecti: Displays a filterable table of activity audit logs with role and action filters, showing timestamps, performer details, and actions with color-coded badges for different roles and action types.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceSectio: Admin-only component with tabs for marking daily attendance and viewing monthly summaries, allowing bulk attendance submission and displaying attendance statistics for all students.
frontend/src/components/DashboardOvervie: Displays key metrics in card format including total students, teachers, fees collected, and pending fees with loading skeletons and error handling with retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/FeesSection.tsx: Manages fee records with search and filter capabilities, displays fee statistics (paid/unpaid), and provides dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting fee records with student selection.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying branding text 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits' with gradient styling and copyright year.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header with School Mitra branding, displays logged-in user profile information (name and role), and provides logout functionality with query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen component with tabs for admin (Internet Identity) and teacher (credentials-based) authentication, including form validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Displays a fixed alert banner at the top of the screen when the user goes offline, listening to browser online/offline events.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time admin profile setup that cannot be dismissed, collecting the user's name before allowing dashboard access.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: Shows a dismissible card prompt in the bottom-right corner to install the app as a PWA with install and dismiss actions.
frontend/src/components/ReportCardsSecti: Manages student report cards with add/edit dialogs, subject marks entry, filtering by student/class, and displays cards in a table with grades and teacher remarks.
Student management interface with search/filter by class, add/edit/delete operations, and displays student profiles in a table with avatar support.
Teacher management section restricted to admins, allowing CRUD operations on teacher profiles with credentials, subjects, and class assignments displayed in a searchable table.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: React hook that manages Progressive Web App installation prompts, handling the beforeinstallprompt event, user dismissals with 7-day cooldown, and installation state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend data operations including user profiles, teacher authentication, dashboard metrics, students, teachers, fees, attendance, report cards, and activity logs with error handling and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens using OKLCH color space, defining light/dark theme variables, premium gradients, glass effects, and solid modal styling with Indian font imports (Dancing Script and Inter).
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions including cn() for Tailwind class merging and formatINR() for formatting numbers as Indian Rupees with proper lakhs/crores grouping.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page component with tabbed navigation for overview, students, teachers, fees, attendance, report cards, and activity logs, with role-based tab visibility for admin and teacher users.
frontend/src/registerServiceWorker.ts: Service worker registration utility that registers /service-worker.js on page load and listens for updates to notify when new versions are available.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing. Includes functions to persist parameters across navigation and clear sensitive data from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including HSL-based color system, custom shadows (premium, glow effects), animations (float, glow, shimmer), and Inter font family. Includes tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document for a school management PWA with multi-role authentication (Admin/Teacher), offline capabilities, and activity audit logging. Tracks existing features including role-based access control, attendance management, and teacher/student management.
